heading: Definitions
label: 1002 Definitions
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I (§ 101 et seq.) of , , , known as the Rock Island Railroad Transition and Employee Assistance Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 96–25494 Stat. 399section 1001 of this titleMay 30, 1980

Amendments1980—Par. (5). inserted “, the estate of such Company in its reorganization proceeding, or the trustee appointed in such proceeding” after “Railroad Company”. The amendment was executed by inserting amendatory text preceding the semicolon instead of the period at end of par. (5) as directed to reflect the probable intent of Congress, in view of par. (5) being enacted without a closing period.Pub. L. 96–448

children.text: “bankruptcy court” means the court having jurisdiction over the reorganization of the Rock Island Railroad;

“employee” includes any employee of the Rock Island Railroad as of , but does not include any individual serving as president, vice-president, secretary, treasurer, comptroller, counsel, member of the board of directors, or any other person performing such functions;August 1, 1979

the term “Rock Island Railroad” means the Chicago, Rock Island and Pacific Railroad Company, the estate of such Company in its reorganization proceeding, or the trustee appointed in such proceeding; and
the term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Transportation.
